data.description:
Add the second motivating op: review code over commits + tickets with
deterministic reviewer selection (the `select_reviewers` rule layer exists) and
multi-reviewer aggregation.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `review_code`-style op assembles commit+ticket context deterministically
- [ ] Runs each selected reviewer as a pass; reuses the findings contract
- [ ] Aggregation: cluster -> consensus -> rank by severity x agreement
- [ ] Exposed over library/CLI/MCP; offline tests via FakeRunner
data.title: Code-review operation + multi-reviewer aggregation
